chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 569 of 2022 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case For orders on MA No.5692/2022 (U/A) 14.09.2023 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioners >>>>>..<<<<< Urgency granted. Learned counsel for the petitioners files a withdrawal statement and states that Petitioner No.3 has expired, whereas, under instructions he does not press this petition on behalf of petitioners 1, 2, 4 to 10. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
